common.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroSub: ApplyFlow AI tracks every job application, links your portfolio projects, and generates a match score, CV bullets, and a cover letter draft for each role — in seconds.
landing.f1Desc: Status, timeline, CV version, cover letter, notes — all in one place.
landing.f2Desc: Connect your GitHub projects to specific jobs to surface the right work.
landing.f3Desc: Gemini scores each fit, suggests CV bullets, and drafts a cover letter.
landing.f4Desc: Response rate, interview conversion, and monthly trends at a glance.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your job search activity.
dashboard.noJobs: No jobs yet — add your first application.
dashboard.noDeadlines: No upcoming deadlines. Set a reminder when adding a job.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Track and manage all your job applications in one place.
jobs.totalCount: {count, plural, one {# application} other {# applications}} total
jobs.emptyDesc: Start tracking your job search. Add your first application and stay on top of every opportunity.
jobs.errorDesc: There was a problem loading your jobs. Try again or refresh the page.
jobs.notFoundDesc: This job either doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
jobs.newSubtitle: Fill in the details below to track a new job application.
jobs.deleteConfirmDesc: "{title}" and all its linked data (analysis, project links, reminders) will be permanently removed.

jobForm.sectionCoreDesc: Required fields to identify the position.
jobForm.sectionPositionDesc: Location, work arrangement, and salary information.
jobForm.sectionApplicationDesc: Where you found the job and your application details.
jobForm.sectionNotesDesc: Extra context, job description, and cover letter.
jobForm.phNotes: Anything else you want to remember…

analyzer.title: Smart fill with AI
analyzer.hint: — paste the posting, we extract the requirements
analyzer.placeholder: Paste the full job posting here…
analyzer.success: Requirements extracted — review them below, then save.
analyzer.stale: The description changed since the last analysis — re-analyze to refresh these.

matches.title: Matches
matches.subtitle: Two-stage AI matching against your CV profile — score your saved jobs, or discover real postings you haven't seen yet. Extra skills never count against you.
matches.noProfileTitle: Set up your career profile first
matches.noProfileDesc: Matching compares your CV profile against your saved jobs — upload your CV to unlock it.
matches.scored: {count, plural, one {# job} other {# jobs}} scored
matches.emptyDesc: Add a job with a description — AI indexes it in the background and it becomes matchable within seconds.
matches.skeletonDefault: AI judge is scoring your jobs — this takes a few seconds…

discover.noProfileDesc: Discovery searches real job postings and scores them against your CV profile.
discover.loadingMsg: Fetching live postings and scoring them against your profile…
discover.emptyDesc: {pool} live postings were checked but none overlapped with your profile — adjust the filters or try again later.
discover.idleHint: Real postings are fetched from live job sources and scored by the AI judge — nothing is invented, and saving one adds it straight to your wishlist. Pick “Türkiye & Local” to search jobs in Turkey.
discover.notConfigured: Türkiye job search is not configured — add RAPIDAPI_KEY to your .env (free key from rapidapi.com, JSearch API).

aiPanel.title: AI Analysis
aiPanel.intro: Generate an AI-powered match analysis for this job. We'll combine the job description with your linked projects to produce a fit score, CV suggestions, and a draft cover letter.

profile.title: Career Profile
profile.subtitle: Upload your CV and let AI extract your skills. This profile powers job matching across ApplyFlow.
profile.pastePlaceholder: Paste the full text of your CV here…
profile.errOnlyText: Only plain-text files (.txt, .md) are supported for now — PDF support is coming. You can also paste your CV text instead.
profile.errTooLarge: File is too large (max 200 KB). CVs are text — this should be plenty.
profile.errRead: Could not read the file. Please try again or paste the text.
profile.summarySavedDesc: Extracted from your CV · last updated {date}
profile.expYears: {years, plural, one {# year} other {# years}} of experience
profile.noCoreSkills: No high-level skills were found in the CV.
profile.noTools: No specific tools were found in the CV.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Your portfolio projects. Link them to job applications so the AI can tailor your CV bullets and cover letter.
projects.emptyDesc: Add your portfolio projects so the AI can match them against job descriptions and tailor your CV bullets.
projects.newSubtitle: Add a portfolio project. The richer the description and tech stack, the better the AI match for your job applications.
projects.notFoundDesc: This project either doesn't exist or you don't have access.
projects.noLinkedJobs: No jobs link this project yet. Open a job and link it from the “Linked Projects” section.
projects.name: Project Name
projects.phDescription: Short summary of what this project does and the problem it solves…
projects.techHint: Comma-separated. These badges show up on your project card.
projects.deleteConfirmDesc: "{name}" will be removed from all linked job applications.
projects.noneLinked: No projects linked yet. Link a project to enrich the AI analysis.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Insights into your job search performance.
analytics.noDataDesc: Add a few job applications and your analytics will populate here automatically.
analytics.monthlyEmpty: No applications in the last {months} months yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your account and AI integration details.
settings.managedByClerk: Profile is managed via Clerk. Use the user menu in the top bar to update your name, email, or password.
settings.aiDesc: The AI analysis feature uses Google Gemini server-side. Your key is read from the environment variable and never exposed to the browser.
settings.aboutText: ApplyFlow AI — your personal AI-powered job application tracker.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: Nothing yet — AI events and status changes will land here.
notifications.enrichedBody: {company} — AI indexed the posting in the background.
notifications.analysisBodyScore: Match score: {score}/100 — open the job to see the details.
notifications.analysisBody: Open the job to see the details.
notifications.discoveredBody: {company} — discovered by AI and added to your jobs.

validation.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://...)
validation.invalidGithubUrl: Please enter a valid GitHub URL
